name: Aurelia Companion
description: Adds server-side filtering by media-stream characteristics that Jellyfin's core API can't express: video dynamic range (SDR/HDR10/HDR10+/Dolby Vision/HLG), video codec, audio codec, audio channel count, and spatial audio (Dolby Atmos / DTS:X). Exposes a paginated, BaseItemDto-compatible endpoint plus a capability endpoint for client feature-detection.
overview: Filter libraries by video range, codecs, audio channels, and spatial audio.

versions.changelog:
- Initial release. - Resolution (isHd/is4K) passthrough for client filtering. - Fix: filtering by a library returned no items. The library (parentId) is now
  resolved into its contents so video range / codec / audio filters work when
  scoped to a specific library.
- Renamed the plugin to "Aurelia Companion" (display name only; API route,
  plugin id, and behavior unchanged).
- Capabilities are now scoped to the requested library (parentId): the available
  values offered for a library are drawn only from items in that library, so any
  single facet selection is guaranteed to match at least one item there. Omitting
  parentId still returns the global value set.

- Initial release. - Resolution (isHd/is4K) passthrough for client filtering. - Fix: filtering by a library returned no items. The library (parentId) is now
  resolved into its contents so video range / codec / audio filters work when
  scoped to a specific library.
- Renamed the plugin to "Aurelia Companion" (display name only; API route,
  plugin id, and behavior unchanged).

- Initial release. - Resolution (isHd/is4K) passthrough for client filtering. - Fix: filtering by a library returned no items. The library (parentId) is now
  resolved into its contents so video range / codec / audio filters work when
  scoped to a specific library.
